caption: A man with a bald head and grey beard, wearing a grey polo shirt and a red-and-white identification badge, stands in what appears to be a trade show or conference setting. He is positioned in front of a white display board featuring the logo "ALPHASZENSZOR" and a list titled "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes." The display includes small images and text, including a contact section for "Alpha Szenszor Inc. 67 South Bedford St." To his left, another man in a grey button-down shirt is partially visible. In the background, signs read "ZB38 AlphaSzenszor Inc." and "ZB39 DexM." As the scene progresses, the man in the polo shirt speaks and looks toward the camera, eventually lifting his right hand to hold and display a small, metallic circular object. The camera maintains a medium shot, capturing the man from the chest up against the informational backdrop.
